task_completion.description: Initiate the repository import process in the TailwindTraders project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps interface showing the 'TailwindTraders' project with the 'Import a repository' dialog or page open.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct source URL for the external repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Clone URL' or 'Source URL' input field contains exactly 'https://github.com/octocat/Hello-World.git'.

task_completion.description: Name the new repository 'LegacyPrototype' and complete the import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repository name field is set to 'LegacyPrototype' and subsequent screens show the successful import of the repository (e.g., viewing the files of LegacyPrototype).

task_completion.description: Create a new branch named 'main' based on the 'master' branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Branches view showing a newly created 'main' branch, or a 'Create branch' dialog showing 'main' being created from 'master'.

task_completion.description: Set 'main' as the default branch for the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Branches view or Repository Settings showing the 'main' branch with a 'Default' badge, or a menu action confirming 'main' is set as the default branch.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Azure DevOps web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal, not a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The imported repository contains actual files from the source, not just an empty initialization.
integrity.visual_evidence: The repository view for 'LegacyPrototype' shows files typical of the Hello-World repo (like a README) rather than being completely empty.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source URL is 'https://github.com/octocat/Hello-World.git'. The source repository's default branch is 'master'. The target project is 'TailwindTraders' and the new repository must be named 'LegacyPrototype'. The expected final default branch is 'main' (Git reference: refs/heads/main).
